source_pr.title: *: load privilege in a goroutine when server initialize
source_pr.body:
Privilege data will be cached in TiDB memory, use a goroutine to update it. 
Start the goroutine when server initialize, in function `BootstrapSession`.

I'll rebase the code after https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/2481

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: load privilege in a goroutine when server initialize.
fix_pattern: *: load privilege in a goroutine when server initialize

evidence: files: bootstrap_test.go, ddl/ddl_db_test.go, domain/domain.go, executor/executor_test.go, perfschema/perfschema_test.go, plan/resolver_test.go, plan/typeinferer_test.go, privilege/privileges/cache.go, privilege/privileges/cache_test.go, privilege/privileges/privileges_test.go, server/tidb_test.go, session.go, session_test.go, sessionctx/binloginfo/binloginfo_test.go, store/tikv/gc_worker_test.go, store/tikv/store_test.go, store/tikv/ticlient_test.go, table/tables/tables_test.go, tidb-server/main.go, tidb.go, tidb_test.go
